PR surface: Tests +32, Docs -2. Total +30 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-helper cleanup PR rather than a reported runtime bug. The reviewable proof is source inspection plus the PR's targeted command and exact-head CI evidence.

target.title: test: add auto-cleaning temp dir helper
target.body:
## Summary
- add `useTempDirTracker()` to `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts`, with Vitest-owned automatic cleanup after each test
- keep the existing lower-level temp-dir helpers for unmigrated tests, while the new auto-cleaning helper intentionally does not expose `cleanup()`
- migrate two small script tests to the helper as positive examples: `runtime-postbuild-stamp` and `parallels-package-log-progress-extract`
- update the testing guide and helper routing expectation for the new helper-backed importers

## Verification
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm tsgo:test`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs --base origin/main --head HEAD --json` -> `[]`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm exec oxfmt --check docs/help/testing.md src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- CI on `c84e510bbb8dcab76414650c284900e628eab3ea`: `check-guards`, `check-test-types`, `checks-node-core-tooling`, and `checks-node-core-tooling-docker` passed; `check-guards` annotations count is `0`
